hero.trustLine3: Payouts every 7 days • No monthly fees

howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to a funded trading career
howItWorks.step1Desc: Start with free structured courses — from your first chart to a complete trading plan. No experience required.
howItWorks.step2Desc: When you're ready, take a funding challenge. Trade within the rules and hit your profit target to pass the evaluation.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Trade our capital on CME, COMEX, NYMEX & CBOT. Withdraw up to 90% of profits with payouts every 7 days.

education.subtitle: You don't need experience to begin — you need a path. Our structured courses take you from zero to evaluation-ready, at your own pace.
education.ctaSubtext: Free to start. No credit card required.
education.track1Desc: Candlesticks, market structure, and order types — everything you need before your first trade, explained in plain English.
education.track2Desc: Read price action with confidence: trends, support and resistance, volume, and the indicators that actually matter.
education.track3Desc: The skill that separates funded traders from blown accounts. Position sizing, drawdown control, and trading psychology.
education.track4Desc: A step-by-step playbook for passing your funding challenge — built from the data of thousands of evaluations.

pricing.subtitle: Pass the evaluation. Get funded. Keep up to 90% of your profits. One-time fee, no monthly charges.
pricing.guarantee: All challenges include a 14-day money-back guarantee

instant.subtitle: Start trading immediately. No evaluation required. Get funded today.

ai.descriptionPart1: Not just another trading platform. Our AI analyzes thousands of traders to find the top 1% — then allocates them real capital. This is

leaderboard.pathDesc: Our AI analyzes every trade, every pattern, every behavior — giving you a real-time Trader Score and personalized coaching to accelerate your funded trading career.
leaderboard.pathNote: Top 1% traders receive larger capital allocations and partnership opportunities.
leaderboard.coachingBody: Reduce position size on volatile sessions. Your risk discipline is strong — focus on improving trend capture by holding winners longer.
leaderboard.rankingsDesc: Compete with funded traders worldwide. Top performers earn larger capital allocations and partnership opportunities.

footer.tagline: Learn to trade with structured courses, prove your skill in our evaluation, and trade funded accounts up to $200K — keeping up to 90% of the profits.
footer.disclaimer: Futures trading involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for every investor. Evaluations are conducted in simulated environments.

risk.riskBody: This is not an investment opportunity. You do not deposit any funds for investment. We do not ask for any funds for investment. At no time do you risk your own capital. There are no promises of rewards or returns.
risk.hypoBody: Hypothetical performance results have many inherent limitations. No representation is being made that any account will or is likely to achieve profits or losses similar to those shown. Hypothetical performance results are generally prepared with the benefit of hindsight and do not involve financial risk; no hypothetical trading record can completely account for the impact of financial risk of actual trading.
risk.instrumentsBody: Streamwalkers Trader Pro customers are allowed to only trade Futures products, listed on the following exchanges: CME, COMEX, NYMEX & CBOT. Trading of Spot Currencies, CFDs, Stocks, Options, and Cryptocurrencies is not permitted or available in our programs, vendors or platforms.
risk.evalBody: The customer pass rate of the evaluation program was 43.13% between January 1, 2023 – Sept 1, 2023, among customers who traded at least one evaluation and obtained a PA Account during this time period. The Evaluation and PA are meant to be as close to a realistic simulation of trading under actual market conditions, including commissions, and the evaluation is difficult to pass even for experienced traders.
risk.compBody: All trades presented for compensation to customers should be considered hypothetical and should not be expected to be replicated in a live trading account. PA Accounts may represent simulated, live or copied accounts. Testimonials and payouts on this website may not be representative of other clients and are not a guarantee of future performance or success.
